description: Intent-only request: classify lead scoring and fixed follow-up branches as hybrid.

text: Say whether this should be handled as a deterministic workflow, a hybrid workflow with a bounded AI judgment step, a full agent, or a single AI task. Briefly explain why in terms of control flow, runtime decision-making, tool-use loops, unstructured data, and whether the next action depends on prior results.
When a new lead arrives, score how promising it is from the message and company, then notify sales if it's high and send a nurture email if it's low.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the lead scoring request as a hybrid workflow.
The agent explains that AI can provide the bounded promising-lead score.
The agent explains that the high and low follow-up paths are deterministic branches.
The agent does not classify the request as a full agent because the action set is fixed.
